completed_slice: Wire GitHub artifact attestation signing and verification into the Cloudflare deployment workflow, then pass the normalized signature result into the deny-by-default evidence acceptance manifest.

source_contract: gh attestation verify targets the exact repository
normalizer requires exact repository, workflow identity, verified state, and SHA-256 subject
acceptance is asserted equal to the conjunction of signature, subject, builder, source, build type, invocation, and deployment claim checks

privacy_boundary: No credentials, secret values, private chat material, health information, or identifying personal data are included.
limits: No GitHub Actions run was associated with the latest commit at inspection time.
No signed attestation bundle, verifier output, Cloudflare URL, or served commit identity was produced in this run.
Cryptographic provenance can authenticate artifact origin and binding; it cannot establish scientific truth or medical validity.
Cloudflare deployment remains blocked until CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN are configured in the cloudflare-research environment.
falsification_route: Run the workflow after environment configuration, inspect the attestation and acceptance artifacts, and reject the slice if the signature normalizer, trusted-builder checks, subject digest, deployment verifier, or acceptance invariant disagree.
